layouts.name: Basic Info
layouts.description: A clean slide layout with title, description text, and a supporting image.

schema.title: string 3-40 chars — Main title of the slide
schema.description: string 10-150 chars — Main description text content

layouts.name: Bullet Icons Only
layouts.description: A slide layout with title, grid of bullet points (title and description) with icons, and a supporting image.

schema.title: string 3-40 chars — Main title of the slide

bulletPoints.title: string 2-80 chars — Bullet point title
bulletPoints.subtitle: string 5-150 chars — Optional short subtitle or brief explanation

layouts.name: Bullet with Icons
layouts.description: A bullets style slide with main content, supporting image, and bullet points with icons and descriptions.

schema.title: string 3-40 chars — Main title of the slide
schema.description: string 0-150 chars — Main description text explaining the problem or topic

layouts.name: Chart with Bullet Boxes
layouts.description: A slide layout with title, description, chart on the left and colored bullet boxes with icons on the right. Only choose this if data is available.

schema.title: string 3-40 chars — Main title of the slide
schema.description: string 10-150 chars — Description text below the title
schema.showLegend: boolean — Whether to show chart legend
schema.showTooltip: boolean — Whether to show chart tooltip

layouts.name: Intro Slide
layouts.description: A clean slide layout with title, description text, presenter info, and a supporting image.

schema.title: string 3-40 chars — Main title of the slide
schema.description: string 10-150 chars — Main description text content
schema.presenterName: string 2-50 chars — Name of the presenter
schema.presentationDate: string 2-50 chars — Date of the presentation must be the latest date like today's date

layouts.name: Metrics
layouts.description: A slide layout for showcasing key business metrics with large numbers and descriptive text boxes. This should only be used with metrics and numbers.

schema.title: string 3-100 chars — Main title of the slide

metrics.label: string 2-50 chars — Metric label/title
metrics.value: string 1-10 chars — Metric value (e.g., 150+, 95%, $2M). No long values. Keep simple number.
metrics.description: string 10-150 chars — Detailed description of the metric. Explanation of the metric.

layouts.name: Metrics with Image
layouts.description: A slide layout with supporting image on the left and title, description, and metrics grid on the right. Can be used alternatively with MetricSlide.

schema.title: string 3-40 chars — Main title of the slide
schema.description: string 10-150 chars — Description text below the title

layouts.name: Numbered Bullets
layouts.description: A slide layout with large title, supporting image, and numbered bullet points with descriptions.

schema.title: string 3-40 chars — Main title of the slide

layouts.name: Quote
layouts.description: A slide layout with a heading, inspirational quote, and background image with overlay for text visibility.

schema.heading: string 3-60 chars — Main heading of the slide
schema.quote: string 10-200 chars — The main quote text content
schema.author: string 2-50 chars — Author of the quote

layouts.name: Table with Info
layouts.description: A slide layout with a title at the top, structured table in the middle, and descriptive text at the bottom.

schema.title: string 3-40 chars — Main title of the slide
schema.description: string 10-200 chars — Descriptive text that appears below the table

layouts.name: Table of Contents
layouts.description: A professional table of contents layout with numbered sections, and page references. This should be right after introduction slide if ever used.

sections.title: string 1-80 chars — Section title
sections.pageNumber: string 1-10 chars — Page number for this section

layouts.name: Team Slide
layouts.description: A slide layout showcasing team members with photos, names, positions, and descriptions alongside company information.

schema.title: string 3-40 chars — Main title of the slide
schema.companyDescription: string 10-150 chars — Company description or team introduction text

teamMembers.name: string 2-50 chars — Team member's full name
teamMembers.position: string 2-50 chars — Job title or position
teamMembers.description: string 0-150 chars — Brief description of the team member (around 100 characters)

layouts.name: Bullet With Icons Slide Layout
layouts.description: Bullets with icons slide layout

schema.title: string 3-20 chars — Main title of the problem statement slide
schema.description: string 50-200 chars — Main content text describing the problem statement

problemCategories.title: string 3-30 chars — Title of the problem category
problemCategories.description: string 20-100 chars — Description of the problem category

layouts.name: Bullet With Icons Description Grid
layouts.description: A bullet with icons description grid slide layout

schema.title: string 3-25 chars — Main title of the slide
schema.mainDescription: string 20-300 chars — Main content text describing the solution

layouts.name: Chart or Table With Description
layouts.description: Chart with description slide layout

schema.title: string 3-60 chars
schema.description: string — Supporting description for the table/chart

layouts.name: Chart With Metrics Slide
layouts.description: A chart or table with metrics slide layout

schema.title: string — Main title of the slide
schema.description: string 3-200 chars — Main content text describing the company's traction and growth momentum.

layouts.name: Image And Description
layouts.description: A slide layout with a title, a description, and an image.

schema.title: string 3-30 chars — Main title of the slide
schema.content: string 25-300 chars — Main content text describing the company or topic

layouts.name: Image List with Description
layouts.description: An image list with description slide layout

schema.title: string 3-40 chars — Main title of the slide. Max 4 words

products.title: string 3-50 chars — Product title
products.isBlueBackground: boolean — Whether the product box has a blue background

layouts.name: Images With Description
layouts.description: Images with description slide layout

schema.title: string 3-40 chars — Main title of the slide
schema.subtitle: string 10-120 chars — Optional subtitle describing the team

teamMembers.name: string 2-50 chars — Card title
teamMembers.description: string 20-120 chars — Short description for the card

layouts.name: Intro Pitch Deck Slide
layouts.description: A visually appealing introduction slide for a pitch deck, featuring a large title, company name, date, and contact information with a modern design. This Slide is always the first slide in a pitch deck, setting the tone for the presentation with a clean and professional look.

schema.title: string 2-15 chars — Main title of the slide
schema.description: string 1-200 chars — Description shown below the title

layouts.name: Metrics With Description and Image Slide Layout
layouts.description: Metrics with description slide layout with an image as whole for the slide

schema.title: string 3-15 chars — Main slide title
schema.description: string — Main description text for the slide

layouts.name: Chart Left Text Right
layouts.description: A slide with header label, a left-side inline bar chart, and right-side title with paragraph.

schema.title: string 16-64 chars — Main heading (max ~7 words)

layouts.name: Table Of Contents
layouts.description: Header with brand marker, title, optional description, and a two-column table of contents list

topBar.marker: string 1-3 chars — Numeric marker on the top bar. Up to 3 digits

schema.title: string 12-68 chars — Main slide title. Max 10 words
schema.description: string 0-200 chars — Lead paragraph. Optional. Max 35 words

items.title: string 4-50 chars — Section title. Max 50 characters

layouts.name: Visual Metrics
layouts.description: A slide with a header bar, numeric marker, title, description, and grid of cards with headings, circular metrics, and texts

topBar.marker: string 1-3 chars — Numeric marker on the top bar. Up to 3 digits

schema.title: string 20-68 chars — Main slide title. Max 10 words
schema.description: string 70-200 chars — Lead paragraph. Max 35 words

cards.title: string 6-18 chars — Card heading. Max 3 words
cards.unit: string 0-2 chars — Unit for the value, e.g., %, K, M
cards.description: string 1-50 chars — Card supporting text. Max 50 characters

layouts.name: Bullet With Icons Title Description
layouts.description: Bullet with icons with title and description and title and description for whole

schema.title: string 3-60 chars

layouts.name: Metrics Numbers
layouts.description: Swift: Our Impact in Numbers with three stacked metric cards

schema.title: string 8-60 chars

layouts.name: Simple Bullet Points
layouts.description: Bullet Points with title and description

schema.title: string 4-36 chars

layouts.name: Table Of Contents
layouts.description: Swift: Table of contents with up to 10 items (title + description)

schema.title: string 3-60 chars

layouts.name: Table Or Chart
layouts.description: Swift: Generic data table with option to render a chart (bar, horizontalBar, line, pie)

schema.title: string 6-60 chars

layouts.name: API Request Response Slide
layouts.description: An API-focused slide with endpoint metadata, request payload, and response payload.

schema.title: string 8-26 chars — Main heading shown at the top-left.
schema.method: GET | POST | PATCH | DELETE — HTTP method badge text.

layouts.name: Cards Grid Slide
layouts.description: A list of cards in grid with title, icon and compact description in each.

schema.title: string 6-20 chars — Slide title shown above the grid.

features.title: string 3-17 chars — Title shown on each card.
features.description: string 18-80 chars — Description shown on each card.

icon.__icon_query__: string — Query used to search the icon

layouts.name: Code Explanation Split Slide
layouts.description: A two-column slide with a code panel on the left and description on the right.

schema.title: string 8-24 chars — Slide heading shown at the top-left.

codeSnippet.language: string 2-10 chars — Programming language of the snippet
codeSnippet.fileName: string 3-30 chars — File name label shown above the code snippet.
codeSnippet.content: string 20-520 chars — The actual code content to be displayed.

schema.descriptionTitle: string 4-20 chars — Heading shown above the paragraph.
schema.description: string 40-360 chars — Description paragraph shown in the right column.

layouts.name: Cover Slide
layouts.description: Opening/cover/intro slide with  organization/institution/presenter, presentation title/heading , and supporting subtitle.

schema.companyName: string 2-18 chars — Optional organization/institution/presenter name shown above the slide title.
schema.title: string 8-28 chars — Title/heading of the slide.
schema.subtitle: string 24-40 chars — Supporting subtitle shown under the heading.

layouts.name: Description and Metrics Slide
layouts.description: A metrics slide with description text on the left and metric cards on the right.

schema.title: string 6-18 chars — Slide title shown at the top-left.
schema.explanationTitle: string 4-16 chars — Heading above the explanatory paragraph.
schema.explanation: string 0-320 chars — Body text for the narrative section.

layouts.name: Description Text Slide
layouts.description: A text-only description slide tihe title/heading.

schema.title: string 8-30 chars — Main slide title shown at the top-left.
schema.descriptionTitle: string 4-20 chars — Subheading above the paragraph body.

layouts.name: Metrics Grid Slide
layouts.description: A slide with metrics card grid and title at the top.

schema.title: string 6-18 chars — Slide heading shown above the KPI cards.

layouts.name: Table Of Content Slide
layouts.description: A two-column table of contents with numbered entries, labels and description.

schema.title: string 8-24 chars — Slide heading shown above the index list.

items.label: string 3-30 chars — Page/Content Name
items.description: string 3-100 chars — Short description for the content section.

layouts.name: Two Column Bullet List Slide
layouts.description: A two-column numbered string list with items.

schema.title: string 6-30 chars — Slide title shown above the numbered list.

layouts.name: Workflow Slide
layouts.description: A workflow slide with cards and directional arrows between steps.

schema.title: string 6-16 chars — Slide title shown above the workflow row.

steps.title: string 3-12 chars — Step title shown in each workflow card.
steps.description: string 18-50 chars — Short step description text.

icon.__icon_query__: string — Query used to search the icon

layouts.name: About Slide
layouts.description: A left text column with company/instructor/presenter/institute name and title introduction and a right-side visual grid made from one repeated image and tinted text panels.

schema.name: string 3-22 chars — Main heading in the left content column.
schema.intro: string 40-100 chars — Bold intro text shown beneath the company heading.
schema.body: string 120-280 chars — Body paragraph in the left content section.
schema.topPanelText: string 20-70 chars — Short text inside the top-right dark panel.
schema.bottomPanelText: string 20-70 chars — Short text inside the bottom-right dark panel.

layouts.name: Content Split Slide
layouts.description: A left collage built from one repeated image and a right content block containing heading, tagline, and paragraph text.

schema.heading: string 0-24 chars — Main right-side heading.
schema.tagline: string 0-12 chars — Small uppercase label shown under the heading.
schema.body: string 0-300 chars — Main descriptive paragraph on the right side.

layouts.name: Cover Slide
layouts.description: Opening/cover/intro slide with  organization/institution/presenter, presentation title/heading , and supporting subtitle.

schema.name: string 3-16 chars — Optional organization/institution/presenter name shown above the slide title.
schema.title: string 6-32 chars — Main centered title of the cover slide.

layouts.name: Report Chart Slide
layouts.description: A left text column with a report title, body, footnote and a right-side chart.

schema.title: string 0-24 chars — Left-side report title.
schema.body: string 80-260 chars — Left-side report body paragraph.
schema.dateRange: string 8-22 chars — Right-panel date range label.
schema.chartType: bar | line | area | pie | donut | scatter — Chart type selector. Supports bar, grouped, stacked, clustered, diverging, line, area, pie/donut, and scatter.

chartData.name: string 1-20 chars — Simple chart category label.

schema.showLegend: boolean — Show or hide chart legend.
schema.showStatusMessage: boolean — Show callout message under chart (useful for weekly/performance styles).
schema.statusMessageTitle: string 8-40 chars — Callout headline under chart.
schema.statusMessageBody: string 10-80 chars — Callout subtitle under chart.

layouts.name: Services Split Slide
layouts.description: A left text column with a heading, one image column, and stacked service description blocks on the right side.

schema.title: string 0-16 chars — Main slide title shown on the left.

sections.heading: string 3-18 chars — Heading shown in the right column.
sections.tagline: string 3-12 chars — Short label under each  heading.
sections.body: string 0-40 chars — Description paragraph shown below the heading and tagline.

layouts.name: Statistics Grid Slide
layouts.description: A left text column with a title, description and a right-side grid of statistics cards,value and label each in a card

schema.title: string 0-16 chars — Main title shown in the left column.
schema.description: string 0-160 chars — Supporting line shown under the left title.

stats.value: string 0-8 chars — Main metric value shown at the top of one card.
stats.label: string 0-45 chars — Label shown under the value.

layouts.name: Table Of Contents Slide
layouts.description: A split layout with a left title panel and a right list of numbered sections, with one subtle background image overlay.

schema.title: string 6-32 chars — Main centered title of the table of contents slide.

items.number: string 2-3 chars — Section number displayed before each section title.
items.label: string 3-30 chars — Section title shown in the right column list.

layouts.name: Timeline Slide
layouts.description: A slide with a title, a horizontal progress line, and short heading and description pairs.

schema.title: string 4-14 chars — Main timeline heading shown at the top-left.

milestones.heading: string 0-6 chars — Heading displayed under each timeline marker.
milestones.description: string 0-50 chars — Short text shown under each heading. with max 50 characters

layouts.name: Title Description with Cards to Text Slide
layouts.description: A slide with a title on top and a description below, and a content section containing cards of text.

schema.title: string 8-16 chars — Main slide title. Max 16 characters.
schema.taglineLabel: string 0-16 chars — Short label above the left-side paragraph.
schema.taglineBody: string 0-100 chars — Supporting paragraph on the left side.

cards.heading: string 0-16 chars — Card heading for one challenge column.
cards.body: string 0-45 chars — Card body copy for one challenge column.
cards.dark: boolean — Controls whether the card uses a dark emphasis style.

layouts.name: Title with Blocks to Text Grid Slide
layouts.description: A slide with a title on top and a content section below containing blocks of text.

schema.title: string 8-24 chars — Main title shown in the top.

blocks.heading: string 0-30 chars — Short heading for a single block of text.
blocks.body: string 0-80 chars — Description text for a single block of text.

layouts.name: Title Description with Table Slide
layouts.description: A slide with a title on top and a description below, and a content section containing a table with column headers and rows of check, cross and empty state of  content.

schema.title: string 0-24 chars — Main heading shown above the table.
schema.subtitle: string 0-80 chars — Short subtitle shown under the main heading.
schema.highlightedColumnIndex: number — 1-based column index for the dark highlighted table header.

rows.label: string 0-18 chars — Row heading shown in the first column.

layouts.name: Title Description with Table Slide
layouts.description: A comparison table slide with a title, a subtitle, column headers, and rows of text content.

schema.title: string 0-14 chars — Main heading shown above the table.
schema.subtitle: string 0-80 chars — Short subtitle shown under the main heading.
schema.highlightedHeaderIndex: number — 1-based column index for the dark highlighted table header.

layouts.name: Cover Slide
layouts.description: A cover slide with a compact logo in the top-left, a date/text/label in the top-right, a centered title, and a image anchored to the bottom with a soft fade into the background.

schema.label: string 3-16 chars — Date/text/label shown at the top-right corner.
schema.titleLine1: string 3-18 chars — First line of the cover title.
schema.titleLine2: string 3-20 chars — Second line of the cover title.

layouts.name: Title Description with Image Gallery Slide
layouts.description: A text slide with a title on top and a description below, and a section containing a gallery of images.

schema.title: string 0-12 chars — Main Title of the slide
schema.description: string 0-120 chars — Supporting paragraph shown under the title.

layouts.name: Introduction Slide
layouts.description: A split slide with a large portrait image on the left and a structured introduction column on the right containing a title and two labeled body paragraphs.

schema.title: string 0-15 chars — Primary title in the right column.

blocks.label: string 3-12 chars — Uppercase mini-heading shown above each introduction paragraph.
blocks.body: string 0-180 chars — Supporting paragraph content for the introduction block.

layouts.name: Title with KPI Cards Slide
layouts.description: A slide with a title on top and a content section containing a grid of KPI cards.

schema.title: string 3-10 chars — Main title shown in the top-left corner.

items.value: string 0-5 chars — Primary KPI value shown in a card. Should be less than 5 characters.
items.body: string 0-16 chars — Short KPI supporting text. Should be less than 16 characters.

layouts.name: Title Description with Lines and Circles
layouts.description: A text slide with a title on top and a description below, and a content section containing a list of bullet points and a grid of circles.

schema.title: string 0-18 chars — Main heading shown at the top-left.
schema.subtitle: string 40-110 chars — Supporting text under the main heading.

bullets.text: string 12-46 chars — Bullet text shown on the left side of a line.

layouts.name: Title Description with Cards Slide
layouts.description: A team introduction slide with a title and intro text on top, followed by a grid of profile cards where one card can be highlighted with a footer style.

schema.title: string 0-18 chars — Main title at the top-left.
schema.taglineLabel: string 0-16 chars — Small heading above team description.
schema.taglineBody: string 0-80 chars — Short descriptive paragraph at top-right.

members.title: string 2-12 chars — Member role or short heading.
members.name: string 2-16 chars — Member name shown in the card footer.
members.highlighted: boolean — Whether this card uses the dark highlight footer.

layouts.name: Text Blocks with Image Block Slide
layouts.description: A slide with a title in the top-left block, text in the top-right , another text block in the bottom-left , and an image in the bottom-right block.

schema.title: string 8-30 chars — Primary heading shown in the top-left tile.

layouts.name: Title Description with Image Block Slide
layouts.description: A slide with a title on top and a description below, and a content section containing an image and a grid of cards of text.

schema.title: string 0-16 chars — Main heading shown at the top-left.
schema.taglineLabel: string 0-16 chars — Small label above left paragraph.
schema.taglineBody: string 0-30 chars — Supporting text shown beneath the tagline label.

services.heading: string 0-14 chars — Card heading.
services.isHighlighted: boolean — Whether this card uses the dark style.

layouts.name: Title with Cards List with Text
layouts.description: A slide with a title on top and a content section containing a list of cards with text content.

schema.title: string 6-18 chars — Main slide title.

plans.price: string 4-12 chars — Plan price label shown at the top of each card.
plans.description: string 0-18 chars — Short statement describing the plan.
plans.highlighted: boolean — Whether this card uses the highlighted dark style.

layouts.name: Title with Process Steps Slide
layouts.description: A slide with a title on top and a content section containing a process diagrams with connected hexagon steps and alternating caption blocks above and below the flow.

schema.title: string 0-14 chars — Main title shown in the top-left corner.

steps.label: string 0-16 chars — Short uppercase label for a process step.
steps.body: string 0-32 chars — Brief explanatory text for the process step.
steps.highlighted: boolean — Whether the hexagon is emphasized with dark fill.

layouts.name: Title Description with Chart and KPI Cards Slide
layouts.description: A text slide with a title on top and a description below, and a content section containing a chart and a grid of KPI cards.

schema.title: string 0-24 chars — Slide heading text.
schema.taglineLabel: string 0-24 chars — Small label above intro paragraph.
schema.taglineBody: string 0-120 chars — Intro paragraph shown beneath the heading.
schema.chartStyle: mini-bars | donut | grouped-bars | dual-line — Chart style variant matching Image #1 to Image #4.
schema.chartTitle: string 3-20 chars — Name displayed in the chart card.

miniBars.label: string 1-10 chars — Category label for the mini bar chart.

groupedBars.label: string 1-12 chars — X-axis label for grouped bars.

trendLines.label: string 1-12 chars — X-axis label for trend lines.

schema.xAxisName: string 3-16 chars — X axis title used in the dual-line variant.
schema.yAxisName: string 3-16 chars — Y axis title used in the dual-line variant.
schema.footerLabel: string 10-60 chars — Footer label under mini bar chart.
schema.footerValue: string 6-24 chars — Footer value under mini bar chart.

bars.value: number — Relative bar value used by legacy data.

schema.metricValue: string 1-8 chars — Legacy single KPI value.
schema.metricBody: string 10-40 chars — Legacy single KPI body.

layouts.name: Table of Content Slide
layouts.description: A two-column table of contents slide with section titles and numbers on a left panel and a title plus description paragraph on the right panel.

schema.title: string 6-18 chars — Heading in the right-side content area.
schema.description: string 50-160 chars — Supporting descriptive paragraph under the heading.

sections.title: string 4-25 chars — Section label shown in the left navigation column.
sections.number: string 2-3 chars — Section number shown beside the section label.
sections.description: string 4-60 chars — Section description shown in the right column.

layouts.name: Bullet List with Icon Title Description Slide
layouts.description: A slide with a title at the top and a two-column list of bullets points underneath. Each point contains a small circular icon badge, a short title on the same row, and a supporting description directly below.

schema.title: string 3-12 chars — Slide title shown at the top-left.

items.title: string 0-30 chars — Short item title displayed next to the icon.
items.description: string 0-60 chars — Supporting sentence shown below the title.

layouts.name: Horizontal Height Spanning Images with Title Slide
layouts.description: A slide of portrait cards placed side by side from edge to edge. Each card uses a full-height image background with a content overlay at the bottom containing a short subtext line and a larger title line.

members.subtext: string 2-40 chars — Subtext for the image.
members.title: string 2-40 chars — Title/name/subject for the image

layouts.name: Intro/Cover Slide
layouts.description: A cover/intro slide with a two-line title section, a divider directly beneath the title, and a presenter information block below the divider containing a name line and a supporting role or company line.

schema.titleFirstLine: string 1-12 chars — First half of title or heading
schema.titleSecondLine: string 1-12 chars — Second half of title or heading
schema.name: string 1-10 chars — Name of the presenter/individual/company/organization.
schema.position: string 1-20 chars — Position or role of the presenter or address of the company/organization.

layouts.name: Metrics Slide
layouts.description: A slide with a title and explanatory text on the left, an optional bulleted list underneath the text, and metric cards on the right. Each metric card contains two stacked metric blocks.

schema.title: string 3-12 chars — Slide title shown at the top-left.
schema.body: string 0-250 chars — Primary paragraph shown below the title.

metrics.value: string 1-6 chars — Primary metric value shown in the card.
metrics.label: string 0-10 chars — Short metric label shown below the value.
metrics.description: string 0-20 chars — Supporting text shown below the label.

layouts.name: Milestone Slide
layouts.description: A slide with a title at the top and a single horizontal milestone sequence below it. The sequence contains five circular markers aligned in one row, and each marker has a heading and description placed directly underneath. The activeIndex field controls which marker is emphasized while the remaining markers stay in the default state.

schema.title: string 3-12 chars — Slide title shown at the top-left.
schema.activeIndex: number — Zero-based index of the highlighted milestone.

items.bulletNumber: string 2-4 chars — Short milestone number such as 01 or 05.
items.heading: string 3-30 chars — Heading displayed below the milestone marker.
items.description: string 10-80 chars — Supporting milestone description shown under the heading. with max 80 characters

layouts.name: Title Description Image Slide
layouts.description: A slide with a title at the top-left, a paragraph block beneath the title, a large supporting image anchored on the right side of the slide.

schema.title: string 3-12 chars — Title/heading of the slide
schema.body: string 0-250 chars — Primary paragraph shown under the title.

layouts.name: Title Image Bullet Cards Slide
layouts.description: A slide with optional image on the left and cards with bullet on the right.

schema.title: string 3-30 chars — Slide heading shown in the top-left corner.
schema.showImage: boolean — Whether the image should be shown.

cards.bulletNumber: string 2-4 chars — Short description step number starting from 01...
cards.description: string 10-80 chars — Bullet point description shown inside the card.

layouts.name: Title Metrics Slide
layouts.description: A slide with a title at the top and tall metric cards arranged horizontally below it. Each card can contain one or two stacked metric blocks, and each block includes a main value, a label, and a supporting description.

schema.title: string 3-80 chars — Slide title shown at the top-left.

metrics.value: string 1-6 chars — Primary metric value shown in the pill.
metrics.label: string 0-20 chars — Short label shown below the metric value.
metrics.description: string 6-50 chars — Supporting metric description shown below the label.

layouts.name: Title Workflow with Title Description Slide
layouts.description: A slide with a title and a horizontal flow. Each step contains a circular icon area, a heading, and a description placed underneath. Directional connectors between the circles indicate sequence, and the activeIndex field determines which step is emphasized.

schema.title: string 3-50 chars — Slide title shown at the top-left.
schema.activeIndex: number — Zero-based index of the emphasized service step.

items.heading: string 3-30 chars — Heading shown below the service icon.
items.description: string 20-60 chars — Supporting description below the service heading.

layouts.name: Adaptive Media Card Grid
layouts.description: A responsive media-card grid that supports compact and dense arrangements.

schema.title: string 0-16 chars — Top heading text.

cards.label: string 0-14 chars — Small top label shown on each card.
cards.title: string 0-18 chars — Primary card title.

image.__image_prompt__: string — A short prompt describing the image content.

layouts.name: Adaptive Value Card Grid
layouts.description: A card grid that supports even layouts and odd-count variants with an emphasized trailing card.

schema.title: string 0-16 chars — Top-left heading.

items.value: string 0-6 chars — Primary card value text.
items.label: string 0-28 chars — Secondary label under the card.

layouts.name: Centered Cover with Footer Metadata
layouts.description: A single-focus cover layout with centered title, subtitle, and footer metadata groups.

schema.title: string 0-20 chars — Main centered cover title.
schema.subtitle: string 0-34 chars — Subtitle beneath the title.

layouts.name: Full-Width Statement
layouts.description: A minimalist emphasis layout with a compact label and a large full-width statement block.

schema.label: string 0-12 chars — Small label above the statement.
schema.statement: string 0-90 chars — Main statement text, with max 90 characters.

layouts.name: Headline with Detail Columns
layouts.description: A layout with a large headline and detail columns containing markers, text, and bullets.

schema.title: string 0-24 chars — Large left-side heading.

sections.title: string 0-16 chars — Section title.
sections.highlighted: boolean — Whether the top marker is filled.

layouts.name: Horizontal Timeline
layouts.description: A horizontal timeline with step markers, item text, continuation state, and optional endpoint label.

schema.title: string 0-18 chars — Top-left heading.
schema.isContinue: boolean — Whether this slide continues a previous timeline slide. Continuation slides use the Continue... heading and draw the axis in from the left edge.
schema.showEndLabel: boolean — Whether to show right-end label near timeline axis.

items.label: string 0-10 chars — Short label above marker icon.
items.title: string 0-16 chars — Heading below marker icon.
items.description: string 0-132 chars — Supporting copy for each timeline item.

layouts.name: Media and Text Split
layouts.description: A split composition with a title and media block on the left and supporting narrative plus footer text on the right.

schema.title: string 0-16 chars — Left panel heading.
schema.sidePanelMode: solid | image — Left media panel mode.
schema.sidePanelColor: string 0-20 chars — Left media color used in solid mode.
schema.headline: string 0-50 chars — Main headline text on the right.
schema.footerText: string 0-28 chars — Footer text at the bottom-right.

layouts.name: Numbered Multi-Column Overview
layouts.description: A multi-column layout with numbered markers, short titles, and descriptive body text.

schema.title: string 0-16 chars — Main heading text.

items.title: string 0-14 chars — Column title.
items.highlighted: boolean — Whether marker circle is filled.

layouts.name: Overlapping Circle Cards
layouts.description: A horizontal row of overlapping circular cards with markers, titles, and text.

schema.title: string 0-12 chars — Main heading text.

layouts.name: Panel List with Media
layouts.description: A table layout with a left multi-column item list and a configurable right media or color panel.

schema.title: string 0-14 chars — Main heading text.
schema.rowVariant: titleOnly | titleWithDescription — Layout variant for item rows.

items.title: string 0-18 chars — Item title in the list.
items.number: string 0-2 chars — Section number shown on the right.
items.description: string 0-40 chars — Optional item description used in description variants.
